document.title: Messaging Gateway
document.summary: Encapsulates access to the messaging system from the rest of the application via a simple interface.
document.implementation: Gateway.Api — IMessagingGateway + HttpMessagingGateway provides a clean HTTP API for submitting messages.

document.title: Messaging Mapper
document.summary: Maps domain objects to and from messaging-specific objects (envelopes) without the domain depending on messaging.
document.implementation: Contracts — IMessagingMapper + JsonMessagingMapper serializes/deserializes domain objects to IntegrationEnvelope payloads.

document.title: Transactional Client
document.summary: The client controls its transactions with the messaging system, sending/receiving within transaction boundaries.
document.implementation: Ingestion — ITransactionalClient + BrokerTransactionalClient wraps produce/consume in transactional scopes.

document.title: Polling Consumer
document.summary: The application explicitly checks for messages on a schedule rather than being notified.
document.implementation: Ingestion — IPollingConsumer + PollingConsumer with configurable poll interval.

document.title: Event-Driven Consumer
document.summary: The application is automatically notified when a message arrives, through a callback or event handler.
document.implementation: Ingestion — IEventDrivenConsumer + EventDrivenConsumer with push-based message delivery.

document.title: Competing Consumers
document.summary: Multiple consumers compete to read from the same channel, enabling parallel processing and load balancing.
document.implementation: Processing.CompetingConsumers uses Kafka consumer groups or NATS queue groups for parallel processing.

document.title: Message Dispatcher
document.summary: Dispatches messages to the appropriate handler based on message type.
document.implementation: Processing.Dispatcher.MessageDispatcher routes messages to registered IMessageHandler implementations by type.

document.title: Selective Consumer
document.summary: A consumer that filters which messages it receives based on selection criteria.
document.implementation: Ingestion — ISelectiveConsumer + SelectiveConsumer applies predicate filters at the consumer level.

document.title: Durable Subscriber
document.summary: A subscriber that does not miss messages published while it is disconnected.
document.implementation: Ingestion — IDurableSubscriber + DurableSubscriber leverages Kafka/NATS persistent subscriptions.

document.title: Idempotent Receiver
document.summary: Handles duplicate messages gracefully by tracking processed message IDs.
document.implementation: Storage.Cassandra deduplication table stores processed message IDs to prevent reprocessing.

document.title: Service Activator
document.summary: Connects a service to the messaging system. Receives a message, invokes the service, and optionally sends a reply.
document.implementation: Processing.Dispatcher.ServiceActivator invokes registered service methods and publishes reply messages.
